mapper.sql: a.admin_id, a.login_id, a.name, a.role, a.store_id, s.store_name, a.status, a.last_login_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_admin a LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON a.store_id = s.store_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_admin a WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM tb_admin a LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON a.store_id = s.store_id WHERE a.admin_id = #{adminId} AND a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_admin (login_id, password, name, role, store_id, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{storeId}, 'ACTIVE', #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_admin SET name = #{name}, role = #{role}, store_id = #{storeId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_admin SET password = #{password}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_admin SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND is_deleted = 0
